strategy: TP + DP (Tensor Parallel + Data Parallel replica)
note: TP communication overhead dominates at 16 GPUs; TP is illustrative for the scaling matrix — its value grows with parameter count (≥70B where activations exceed single-GPU HBM). At LLaMA-3.1-8B it measurably underperforms pure data-parallel sharding. The TP groups here are NOT aligned to node boundaries (TP=2 × DP_replicate=8 on 2 nodes spreads TP ranks across NVLink + IB edges); a node-aligned variant would set tensor_parallel_degree=8 + data_parallel_replicate_degree=2 at a materially different communication cost.
wall_clock_includes: step 1 start through Training completed (includes step-0 compile/warmup + step-60 checkpoint save + teardown)
tokens_per_sec_per_gpu_window: steady-state window (TorchTitan internal throughput counter, excludes compile/warmup); back-of-envelope (total_tokens / wall_clock) is lower and not directly comparable
mfu_formula: (tokens_per_sec_per_gpu * 4.8e10 flops/token) / 9.89e14 flops/gpu  # H200 BF16 peak, Llama-3.1-8B 6*P forward+backward
